title: The ancient mountain kingdom where fantasy comes to life
description: By Maureen O’Hare, CNN (CNN) — The dense forests, twisting rivers and granite peaks of Northern Ireland’s Mourne Mountains have lived many lives and assumed many names. They’re Westeros in “Game of Thrones.” They’re “Krypton” in the Superman prequel. title: The ancient mountain kingdom where fantasy comes to life
description: Relatively few international visitors come to Northern Ireland to explore the Mourne Mountains — but as fantasy worlds they’ve been inspiring imaginations globally for more than 75 years.

title: Kraken-like octopuses ruled ancient oceans, new fossil discovery unveils the mighty giant sea creatures
description: Ancient oceans were ruled by 19-metre octopus, says study.
